item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
root='longhorizon-work/scenario-02'
jq -e '. == {schema_version: 2, mode: \"streaming\", max_parallel: 3, owner: \"operations\", queues: [\"new\", \"retry\"]}' \""'$root/config/onboarding.json" >/dev/null
echo '"'PASS JSON: streaming mode; all other fields unchanged'
rg -q 'streaming mode for the operations owner' \""'$root/docs/onboarding.md"
rg -q -- '"'--mode streaming' \""'$root/docs/onboarding.md"
echo '"'PASS docs: prose and example use streaming'
if rg -n -i 'batch' \""'$root"; then
  echo '"'FAIL batch remains in fixture'
  exit 1
fi
echo 'PASS stale-mode scan: no batch references'
if rg -n -i 'generated_at|timestamp|2026-07-18|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}' \""'$root/config/onboarding.json" "$root/docs/onboarding.md"; then
  echo '"'FAIL forbidden reproducibility metadata found'
  exit 1
fi
echo 'PASS reproducibility constraints preserved'
rg -n -i 'streaming|--mode' \""'$root"'
